title: Minetown
description: This mod adds towns - villages, but better. These towns contain a fountain in the middle, houses, apartment buildings...
body:
# Minetown
If you're tired from normal villages, this mod is for you. It adds towns - villages, but better. They contain things like fountains, houses, apartment building,...

Sunterra (Plains, Forests): oak trees, stone brick fountain, houses contain stone bricks, oak planks, oak saplings in flower pots, brown beds

Solara (Desert): sandstone houses, sandstone fountain, big building for job blocks, cactuses in flower pots, dead acacia trees

Redspire (Badlands): red sandstone houses, red sandstone fountain, cactuses and dead bushes in flower pots, dead oak trees

# Important Information
We have a universal Discord server that has an issue tracker.
